---
title: "Aim 1: Cross-sectional Risk Burden Analysis"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
```

```{r load-data}
# Load data pre-built by 00_load_analysis_data.R

# All participants
lastvisit_all_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lastvisit_all.rds"))

lastvisit_all_dat_long <- lastvisit_all_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) 

# Excluding MCI participants
lastvisit_nomci_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lastvisit_nomci.rds"))

lastvisit_nomci_dat_long <- lastvisit_nomci_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) 
```

## Risk burden distribution

```{r risk-burden-distribution}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

p1 <- ggplot(risk_dat_long, aes(x = factor(risk_score_cogd))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "CogDrisk Composite Risk Score Distribution",
       x = "Risk Score (0-4)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(risk_dat_long, aes(x = factor(risk_score_libra2))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "coral", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score Distribution",
       x = "Risk Score (0-4)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

p1 + p2
```

## Burden associations with biomarker levels

```{r risk-burden-assoc, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6
#| out-width: "100%"
risk_scores_longer <- lastvisit_all_dat_long %>%
  select(risk_score_cogd, risk_score_libra2,
         biomarker, measure) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(risk_score_cogd, risk_score_libra2),
               names_to = "risk_score_type",
               values_to = "risk_score_value") %>%
  mutate(
    # Extract model type (CogDrisk or LIBRA2)
    model_type = case_when(
      str_detect(risk_score_type, "cogd") ~ "CogDrisk",
      str_detect(risk_score_type, "libra2") ~ "LIBRA2"
    ),
    
    risk_score_factor = factor(risk_score_value)
  )

# CogDrisk only
cogdrisk_plot <- risk_scores_longer %>%
  filter(model_type == "CogDrisk") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = risk_score_factor, y = measure, fill = risk_score_factor)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.x.npc = 0.05,
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Figure 1. Blood-based Biomarker Levels by Composite Risk Score") +
  #theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
cogdrisk_plot

# LIBRA2 only
libra2_plot <- risk_scores_longer %>%
  filter(model_type == "LIBRA2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = risk_score_factor, y = measure, fill = risk_score_factor)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 5) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
libra2_plot

ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "fig1_risk_burden_assoc_plot.png"), 
       cogdrisk_plot, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Sensitivity: excluding MCI

```{r risk-burden-assoc-nomci, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6
#| out-width: "100%"
risk_scores_longer <- lastvisit_nomci_dat_long %>%
  select(risk_score_cogd, risk_score_libra2,
         biomarker, measure) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(risk_score_cogd, risk_score_libra2),
               names_to = "risk_score_type",
               values_to = "risk_score_value") %>%
  mutate(
    # Extract model type (CogDrisk or LIBRA2)
    model_type = case_when(
      str_detect(risk_score_type, "cogd") ~ "CogDrisk",
      str_detect(risk_score_type, "libra2") ~ "LIBRA2"
    ),
    
    risk_score_factor = factor(risk_score_value)
  )

# CogDrisk only
cogdrisk_plot <- risk_scores_longer %>%
  filter(model_type == "CogDrisk") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = risk_score_factor, y = measure, fill = risk_score_factor)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.x.npc = 0.05,
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 5) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by CogDrisk Composite Risk Score") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
cogdrisk_plot

# LIBRA2 only
libra2_plot <- risk_scores_longer %>%
  filter(model_type == "LIBRA2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = risk_score_factor, y = measure, fill = risk_score_factor)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 5) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
libra2_plot

# ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_risk_plot.png"), combined_risk_plot, width = 14, height = 14, dpi = 300)
```

## Linear regression model fitting

```{r regression}
risk_dat <- lastvisit_all_dat %>%
  # Z-scored CRS for interpretable per-SD coefficient plots
  mutate(score_cogd_z = as.numeric(scale(score_cogd)),
         score_libra2_z = as.numeric(scale(score_libra2)))

# Models
models <- tribble(~model, ~predictors,
                  "CogDrisk", "apoe_burden + score_cogd + GRS + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2", "age + sex + educ + apoe_burden + score_cogd + GRS + fhx_burden",
                  
                  # CRS and GRS as continuous measures
                  "CogDrisk_cont", "apoe_burden + score_cogd_z + GRS + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_cont", "apoe_burden + score_libra2_z + GRS + fhx_burden") 

# Fitting models
risk_preventad <- expand_grid(
  outcome = BIOMARKERS_TRANS,
  models
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    eq = glue("{outcome} ~ {predictors}"),
    res = map(eq, ~lm(as.formula(.), data = risk_dat)),
    dataf = map(res, tidy),
    mod = map(res, glance)
  )
```

```{r regression-results}
res_risk_preventad <- bind_rows(select(risk_preventad, model, outcome, dataf)) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, '^risk_|^apoe_burden|^grs_|^fhx_burden|^score|^GRS$')
  ) %>%
  arrange(outcome, term, estimate) %>%
  mutate(
    # Significance flag
    sig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, TRUE, FALSE),
    
    # Confidence intervals
    conf.low = estimate - (std.error * 1.96),
    conf.high = estimate + (std.error * 1.96),
    
    # Exponentiated values for log-transformed outcomes 
    exp_est = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(estimate),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_lci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(conf.low),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_uci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(conf.high),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pct_change = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ (exp_est - 1) * 100,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Result category
    res = case_when(
      sig == TRUE ~ "Significant",
      sig == FALSE ~ "Not Significant"
    ),
    stars = case_when(
      p.value > 0.05 ~ "", 
      between(p.value,  0.01, 0.05) ~ "*",
      between(p.value, 0.001, 0.01) ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***"
    ),
    
    # Composite score type
    composite_type = if_else(str_detect(model, "CogDrisk"), "CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")
  ) %>%
  # Round numeric values
  mutate(across(c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, 
                  conf.low, conf.high, exp_est, exp_lci, exp_uci, pct_change), 
                ~round(., digits = 3)))
```

## Regression results - Plot

```{r regression-results-plot}
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 9
#| out-width: "100%"

outcome_labels <- c(
  ab_ratio               = "A\u03b242/40",
  gfap_log               = "GFAP (log)",
  nfl_log                = "NfL (log)",
  ptau181_log            = "p-tau181 (log)",
  ptau217_log            = "p-tau217 (log)",
  ptau217_ab42_ratio_log = "p-tau217/A\u03b242 (log)"
)

# Term ordering: top to bottom in plot
term_order <- c(
  "Clinical Risk Score",
  "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
  "Family History (\u22652 FDR)",
  "Genetic Risk Score"
)

plot_data_combined <- bind_rows(
  res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "CogDrisk_cont") %>%
    mutate(
      composite_type = "CogDrisk",
      term = case_when(
        term == "apoe_burden"  ~ "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
        term == "fhx_burden"   ~ "Family History (\u22652 FDR)",
        term == "score_cogd_z" ~ "Clinical Risk Score",
        term == "GRS"          ~ "Genetic Risk Score",
        TRUE ~ term
      )
    ),
  res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "LIBRA2_cont") %>%
    mutate(
      composite_type = "LIBRA2",
      term = case_when(
        term == "apoe_burden"   ~ "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
        term == "fhx_burden"    ~ "Family History (\u22652 FDR)",
        term == "score_libra2_z" ~ "Clinical Risk Score",
        term == "GRS"           ~ "Genetic Risk Score",
        TRUE ~ term
      )
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    sig            = factor(sig, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE)),
    composite_type = factor(composite_type, levels = c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")),
    outcome_label  = outcome_labels[outcome],
    term           = factor(term, levels = rev(term_order))
  )

caption_text <- paste0(
  "Cohort: PREVENT-AD. N = ", nrow(risk_dat), "\n",
  "Models: Biomarker ~ APOE \u03b54 + Composite Score + Genetic Risk Score + Family History\n",
  "Composite scores z-scored; \u03b2 reflects per-SD change. ",
  "Shared terms (APOE \u03b54, GRS, Family History) estimated separately per model."
)

res_plot_combined <- ggplot(
  plot_data_combined,
  aes(y = term, x = estimate,
      xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high,
      color = composite_type,
      alpha = sig,
      group = composite_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_errorbarh(linewidth = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), height = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey40") +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c(`FALSE` = 0.25, `TRUE` = 1),
    labels = c(`FALSE` = "Not Significant", `TRUE` = "Significant"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CogDrisk" = "#374E55FF", "LIBRA2" = "#DF8F44FF"),
    name = "Model"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome_label, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x       = "Beta (95% CI)",
    y       = "Predictor",
    title   = "Figure 2. Composite Risk Burden Components Coefficient Plots",
    caption = caption_text
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x    = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title     = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title     = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.caption   = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0, lineheight = 1.2,
                                  margin = margin(t = 10)),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title   = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text    = element_text(size = 9)
  )

res_plot_combined

ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "fig2_risk_lm_res.png"),
       res_plot_combined,
       width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```


## Save results

```{r save-results}
# Save main results table
df <- res_risk_preventad %>%
  filter(!str_detect(model, '_cont'))

write_csv(res_risk_preventad, file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "crosssectional_results.csv"))
```
